summary: Completed testing of Delivery Box Management System. All features working correctly: delivery user login, box card display on dashboard, admin login, admin delivery boxes tab. Backend APIs return correct data.

issues: Console warning: HTML nesting issue with <span> inside <tbody> - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Delivery user login with phone 0900000000 and password delivery123
✅ Delivery user navigates to /delivery/dashboard after login
✅ MyBoxCard component displays on delivery dashboard
✅ MyBoxCard shows 'صندوقي' (My Box) title
✅ MyBoxCard shows BOX-001 serial number
✅ MyBoxCard shows 25% progress indicator
✅ MyBoxCard shows deposit amount (15,000 ل.س)
✅ MyBoxCard shows 0 installments paid, 10 remaining
✅ MyBoxCard shows 'سجل الدفعات (1)' payments history
✅ MyBoxCard shows ownership progress bar
✅ Admin user login with phone 0911111111 and password admin123
✅ Admin navigates to /admin after login
✅ Admin can access Delivery Boxes tab via 'صناديق التوصيل' button
✅ Admin Delivery Boxes tab shows stats (2 total, 1 available, 1 assigned)
✅ Admin Delivery Boxes tab shows BOX-001 assigned to 'فهد المندوب'
✅ Admin Delivery Boxes tab shows BOX-002 as available
✅ Admin Delivery Boxes tab shows 25% progress bar for BOX-001
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/login returns correct tokens
✅ Backend API: GET /api/delivery-boxes/my-box returns box data with has_box=true
✅ Backend API: GET /api/delivery-boxes/admin/all returns all boxes with stats
✅ Backend API: GET /api/delivery/documents/status returns 'approved'
critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryBoxesTab.js fetches from /api/delivery-boxes/admin/all with proper admin auth
DeliveryDashboard correctly includes MyBoxCard component in the layout
Box ownership progress calculation works correctly (25% = 15000/60000)
Payments history expandable section implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Updated delivery_documents collection with status='approved' for delivery user to enable dashboard access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery Box Management System fully tested and working. Delivery user 0900000000 has BOX-001 assigned with 15000 SYP deposit (25% progress). Admin panel shows delivery boxes tab with all box data. The delivery_documents status was updated to 'approved' to enable dashboard access. All backend APIs working: /api/delivery-boxes/my-box, /api/delivery-boxes/admin/all, /api/delivery/documents/status.

list: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - accepts any 6-digit OTP

delivery_dashboard.my_box_card: Shows assigned box BOX-001 with 25% progress, 15000 SYP deposit, 10 remaining installments

admin_panel.action_buttons: Payment and Return buttons visible for assigned boxes

apis.my_box: GET /api/delivery-boxes/my-box - Returns box data for delivery user
apis.admin_all: GET /api/delivery-boxes/admin/all - Returns all boxes with stats
